---
description: List bookmarks for the current project or from a peer
argument-hint: "[--limit <n>] [--offset <n>] [--from <peer>]"
---

Run `oneiros bookmark list $ARGUMENTS` to see bookmarks. By default lists local bookmarks for the current project. Use `--from` to list bookmarks available on a peer.

```bash
oneiros bookmark list --from dreamforge
```
